Portfolio

Projects & Case Studies

Company work is presented as architecture case studies (no source code). Personal projects include full GitHub code and live demos you can run.

Personal Project

Google Play Music App

Mobile music application built with Java and XML, focused on reliable playback UX, clean navigation, and production delivery.

  • Java
  • XML
  • Android
  • UI/UX
  • Google Play
  • Published a real mobile product to Google Play
  • Implemented maintainable code structure and reusable UI patterns
  • Improved app usability through practical debugging and flow refinement
Google PlayGitHub

Company Case Study

Restaurant QR Order & Payment Platform

Multi-venue ordering and payment platform with real-time kitchen workflow and role-based admin operations.

  • Next.js
  • Node.js
  • PostgreSQL
  • Docker
  • Yookassa
  • Stripe
  • Handled multi-venue workflows and live kitchen updates
  • Improved session reliability and checkout completion
  • Delivered secure payment flows and reconciliation
Case StudyScreenshots

Personal Project

Java Payment API

Personal Spring Boot application focused on payment orchestration, validation, testing, and production-ready architecture.

  • Java
  • Spring Boot
  • PostgreSQL
  • JUnit
  • Docker
  • Layered architecture with strong validation and error handling
  • Integration tests and CI pipeline for release confidence
  • Ready for live deployment and demo usage
GitHubLive Demo

Personal Project

Real-Time Notification Service

Backend-first service for real-time events with WebSocket broadcasting, persistence, and resilient delivery.

  • Java
  • WebSocket
  • Redis
  • PostgreSQL
  • Docker
  • Designed event pipeline for low-latency updates
  • Implemented retry-safe delivery and durable message storage
  • Improved observability with structured logs
GitHubArchitecture
